prompt: Are the unit tests in packages/sources/tiingo/test/unit meaningful business-logic tests, or are they testing framework behavior? Follow strict unit-test scope.
assertions: Distinguishes framework orchestration vs isolated business/helper logic appropriate for unit/.
Output includes approved and rationale; rationale empty if tests are on-target per skill.
Grounds conclusions in the actual test file(s) under packages/sources/tiingo/test/unit.
